title: Bombercraft
body:
I made this for the Bombergirl ENG Discord Server and to all Bomberman fans

Aims to recreate Bombergirl Gameplay and also integrate with survival Minecraft.

Currently you cannot make maps on survival mode.
Craftable items/blocks:
- Laser Walls
- Skills (Wall/s, Ultimate Wall/s, Cosmic Laser Bomb)
- Bomb / Boots / Flame
- Bomber Crystals

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/w8jAZYMH0zk?si=7OArZd3NvffkKlNN" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Will become public when completion is atleast 50%
